title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Dhanbad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate:
Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate!
